package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "google.golang.org/grpc"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for grpc_no_keepalive_config: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `grpc.NewServer()` without keepalive server parameters in long-running services
type CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigModel
}

type CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigService struct {
    repo *CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGrpcNoKeepaliveConfig(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGrpcNoKeepaliveConfigDTO) error {
    focus := "grpc_no_keepalive_config"
    _ = focus
    cfg := map[string]string{"feature": "from startup"}
    _ = cfg
    var conn *grpc.ClientConn
    _ = conn
    grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative := map[string]int{"grpc": 1, "no": 2, "keepalive": 3, "config": 4}
    grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    grpc_negative_0 := grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative["grpc"] + len(input)
    _ = grpc_negative_0
    no_negative_1 := grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative["no"] + len(input)
    _ = no_negative_1
    keepalive_negative_2 := grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative["keepalive"] + len(input)
    _ = keepalive_negative_2
    config_negative_3 := grpc_no_keepalive_config_negative["config"] + len(input)
    _ = config_negative_3
    return nil
}
